title: All Music Unlocked
description: Vanilla music is no longer restricted. Any track can play anywhere!
body:
This pack takes the sound cues for the game's vanilla music and says the events aren't the boss. If you've ever wanted to have Rubedo play in the End, Labyrinthine while fighting Blazes in the Nether, or the dragon fight music while you pick flowers, you should try this one out. Any song can play anywhere in the game, including the main menu.

**_Pack contains no music files, only sound cues to call the base game files. If you have a pack that replaces music with the base names, this may not work as intended._**
